query:
SELECT id, variantCode, variantName, customerSku, supplierSku, customerId, variantType, erpCompanyId, createdAt
FROM product_variants 
WHERE erpCompanyId = 1
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT id, variantCode, variantName, customerSku, supplierSku, customerId, variantType, erpCompanyId, createdAt
FROM product_variants 
WHERE erpCompanyId = 1
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
